prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large green metal cube
  - obj_1: large brown rubber sphere
  - obj_2: small blue metal cylinder
  - obj_3: small green rubber sphere
  - obj_4: large purple metal cylinder
  - obj_5: small yellow rubber sphere
  - obj_6: large green rubber cylinder
  - obj_7: large green rubber sphere
  - obj_8: large brown rubber cylinder

Questions:
[qrr_0101] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_2. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0102] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0103] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0104] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0105] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0106] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0107] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0108] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0109] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0110] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0111] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0112] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0113] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0114] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0115] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0116] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0117] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0118] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0119] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0120] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D scene and compare distances between objects. Let me first identify the approximate positions of each object based on the image.

From the image, I can estimate positions:
- obj_0 (large green metal cube): right side, front area
- obj_1 (large brown rubber sphere): back area, behind center
- obj_2 (small blue metal cylinder): center area
- obj_3 (small green rubber sphere): left side, front-center
- obj_4 (large purple metal cylinder): front area
- obj_5 (small yellow rubber sphere): left-center area
- obj_6 (large green rubber cylinder): left side, behind-center
- obj_7 (large green rubber sphere): right side, behind-right
- obj_8 (large brown rubber cylinder): right-back area

Wait, let me re-read the objects. The image shows small objects, not large ones necessarily. Let me reconsider based on descriptions:

- obj_0: large green metal cube (right front)
- obj_1: large brown rubber sphere (back center)
- obj_2: small blue metal cylinder (center)
- obj_3: small green rubber sphere (left front)
- obj_4: large purple metal cylinder (front center)
- obj_5: small yellow rubber sphere (left center)
- obj_6: large green rubber cylinder (left back)
- obj_7: large green rubber sphere (right back)
- obj_8: large brown rubber cylinder (right back)

Distance obj_0 to obj_6: obj_0 is right-front, obj_6 is left-back - fairly large distance, maybe ~7-8 units.

Let me estimate all pairwise distances and compare to obj_0-obj_6 distance (~7-8 units).
